o.f.c.i.sqlscript.ParserSqlScript : Found statement at line 1: CREATE TABLE `spc`.`flyway_schema_history` ( `installed_rank` INT NOT NULL, `version` VARCHAR(50), `description` VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL, `type` VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, `script` VARCHAR(1000) NOT NULL, `checksum` INT, `installed_by` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, `installed_on` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, `execution_time` INT NOT NULL, `success` BOOL NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT `flyway_schema_history_pk` PRIMARY KEY (`installed_rank`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB AS SELECT 1 as "installed_rank", '1' as "version", '<< Flyway Baseline >>' as "description", 'BASELINE' as "type", '<< Flyway Baseline >>' as "script", NULL as "checksum", 'developer' as "installed_by", CURRENT_TIMESTAMP as "installed_on", 0 as "execution_time", TRUE as
